LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO DISBURSE SURPLUS FUNDS. NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR. THE MOTION WAS FILED ON MARCH 11, 2021, AND THEREFORE WAS NOT FILED AND SERVED AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE DATE OF THE HEARING, AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1005(B). IN ADDITION, AS THE COURT RECENTLY RULED IN DENYING AN EX PARTE APPLICATION IN THE SAME CASE, THIS MATTER RELATES TO THE DISPOSITION OF SURPLUS FUNDS AFTER A TRUSTEE'S SALE OF REAL PROPERTY, AND THEREFORE MUST BE HEARD IN DEPT. 501. (SEE SF LOCAL RULE 8.10.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Off Calendar Aug-12-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: NOTICE OF HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS: Claims by Chase and FTB are GRANTED per June 18, 2021 tentative ruling. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Off Calendar Jul-23-2021 Continued To Aug-12-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

NOTICE OF HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS is continued to August 12, 2021. The Court will provide notice. Hearing will be required.

Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Off Calendar Jun-18-2021 Continued To Jul-23-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Manuel C. Rodriguez, homeowner of foreclosed property, appearing in person.

No other appearances.

Mr. Rodriguez states that he did not give notice to counsel that he would be appearing in court today to contest the tentative ruling. The court informs Mr. Rodriguez they arguments cannot be heard if notice was not given. The court rules as follows: Notice Of Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds is continued to July 23, 2021. The court will give notice of new hearing date. Hearing will be required. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disburse Surplus Funds
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: RESPONDENT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Disburse Surplus Funds is DENIED without prejudice. No admissible evidence regarding entitlement to funds provided. The clerk of the Court will set a hearing on all claims filed in this action for June 18, 2021. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disburse Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Mar-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RESPONDENT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Disburse Surplus Funds.

No appearances in this matter. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Off calendar. The motion was filed on March 11, 2021, and therefore was not filed and served at least 16 court days before the date of the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). In addition, as the Court recently ruled in denying an ex parte application in the same case, this matter relates to the disposition of surplus funds after a trustee's sale of real property, and therefore must be heard in Dept. 501. (See SF Local Rule 8.10.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
